name: Tiramisu- Olive Garden
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Brandy, Rum, or Your Favorite Liqueur
1 and 1/2 pounds Cream Cheese or Mascarpone
1 and 1/2 cups Superfine or Powdered Sugar
recipeInstructions:
Cream cheese or mascarpone should be at room temperature. Mascarpone is available at some Italian specialty food stores and gourmet food stores.
- Cut across the middle of the sponge cake to form two disks, about 1"-1.5 inches thick each.
- Blend the coffee or espresso and liqueur together.
- Sprinkle the bottom half of the cake with the coffee liqueur blend, enough to flavor it strongly but not saturate it so much that it will collapse.
- Mix the cream cheese or mascarpone with the sugar and beat the cheese until the sugar is completely dissolved and the cheese is light and spreadable.
- Spread the bottom half of the cake with a fairly thick layer of the creamy cheese.
- Place the second half of the cake on top and repeat by sprinkling the coffee/liqueur blend and spreading with the remaining cream cheese.
- Coats the top layer of cream cheese completely with cocoa powder using a wire strainer.
- Refrigerate the cake for at least two hours before cutting and serving.
